task.objective: Add an optional deterministic human-readable rendering of the existing AI PR evidence packet for the static-input and local GitHub importer CLIs without changing packet schema, JSON bytes, collection behavior, authority, or product semantics.

forbidden: modification of existing Machine Task Contracts
API key, token, credential, billing, credit, paid cloud, or paid SaaS setup
PR body, review body, patch body, command log, or target file-content collection
target repository checkout, code execution, or verification execution
API, MCP, web, GitHub App, SARIF, or model-provider delivery surfaces
canonical terminology, Verdict, Trust, Evidence authority, or product-semantic changes
product readiness, trusted release, or authoritative Proofrail product Verdict claims

requirements: Add GATE-REPORT-001 as the first branch commit.
Preserve buildEvidencePacket(input), the evidence packet schema, and v0.1 default JSON output byte-for-byte.
Add optional --format json|human to both pnpm evidence-gate and pnpm evidence-gate:github; omitted format remains json.

Human mode writes a deterministic fixed-section report to stdout or --output with exactly one trailing newline and no color, timestamps, terminal-width wrapping, environment-dependent text, invented status, or invented Verdict.
Escape control characters, ANSI escape bytes, and embedded newlines in untrusted text so report data cannot forge headings or sections.

Render pull-request identity, packet identity, attention counts, claims, observed evidence, missing evidence, scope, review needs, and explicit non-readiness/product-boundary statements in a fixed documented order; empty collections render as (none).
Reject missing, invalid, or duplicate --format arguments deterministically; GitHub CLI validates format before invoking gh and human mode performs no additional collection.
Share one small pure package-local renderer between both CLIs; do not add a production dependency on governance scripts or a new external package.

Add a sanitized golden report fixture and tests for exact rendering, reordered-input determinism, empty sections, missing evidence, review needs, scope exceptions, control/ANSI escaping, both CLIs, stdout/file output, one newline, invalid/duplicate format, and unchanged JSON compatibility.
Add concise README usage/security-boundary documentation and a Phase 2 plan record.
Do not claim product readiness, trusted release, independent acceptance, or an authoritative Proofrail product Verdict.

requiredInvariants: The MTC is the first branch commit and every changed path is writable.
Default and explicit json output remain byte-identical to the pre-report CLI output.
Human output is deterministic, fixed-order, one-newline, and safe against control/ANSI/newline structure injection.
The renderer is pure and package-local; both CLIs use it without adding collection fields or network behavior.
Claims remain non-authoritative, missing evidence remains explicit, and boundaries do not overclaim readiness, trusted release, or Verdict.
No dependency, lockfile, target execution, GitHub write, authority, semantic, or collection-boundary change is introduced.

stopConditions: External dependency or lockfile change required
Credentials, API keys, credits, billing, paid cloud, or paid SaaS required: BLOCKED_COST_RISK
Target checkout, content or patch collection, or target execution required: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Authority or product semantics must change: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Existing defect cannot be resolved within scope: BLOCKED_SCOPE
